losses.detail: Attachment files are not represented in the current ledger contract; original links may remain in imported text.
Review comments are preserved where imported, but thread resolution and full review-thread semantics are not represented.
CI runs, logs, artefacts and checks are not represented in the current ledger contract.
Forge workflow definitions are not imported as executable or portable workflow records.
Repository roles, teams and permission rules are not represented by Waystone migration plans.
Branch protection and ruleset semantics are not represented by Waystone migration plans.
Source author snapshots are preserved as evidence, but users are not mapped to target or local identities.
Release records may be counted, but release asset files are not represented in the current ledger contract.
Target visibility and access-control semantics cannot be confirmed without a target-specific bridge.

warnings: Attachments are not yet represented
Review thread semantics are only partially represented
Users are not yet mapped to local identities
CI history is not represented
